message:
fix: clippy lint fixes in survival, pane_tiers, and snapshot bench

survival.rs:
  - Replace `a + b * c` arithmetic with `b.mul_add(c, a)` in the
    Weibull gradient computation (clippy::suboptimal_flops). Uses
    fused multiply-add for better floating-point precision in the
    hazard rate gradient steps for beta, log_shape, and log_scale.
  - Replace manual index loop `for j in 0..COUNT { params.beta[j] }`
    with `for (beta, grad) in params.beta.iter_mut().zip(...)` to
    satisfy clippy::needless_range_loop and improve readability.
  - Remove unused imports: `Arc` (moved to #[cfg(test)]), `Instant`,
    `info`, `warn` — only `debug` tracing macro is used at runtime.

pane_tiers.rs:
  - Add `let _ =` to three test-only calls to classify() and
    classify_all() whose return values were being silently ignored.
    These functions now return Results for error propagation; the
    tests intentionally discard the value since they assert on
    side-effects (tier state), not the return value.

snapshot_engine.rs (bench):
  - Fix double-dereference: `for p in *panes` → `for p in panes`.
    The slice is already behind a single reference; the extra deref
    caused a clippy::explicit_auto_deref warning.

No behavioral changes — all fixes are lint-only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
